_meta.description: Lookup table mapping insurer name → claims fax number + mailing address. Used by credimed-claim-submitter to determine the fax destination and the address rendered on the ADA form.
_meta.format: Insurer key is lowercase, normalized (no punctuation). The Lambda matches via fuzzy lowercased substring on claim.insurer.

verificationLevels.verified-by-phone: Called the carrier's provider line and confirmed the fax number works
verificationLevels.found-on-carrier-website: Listed in a public PDF or page on the carrier's domain. Should be re-confirmed by phone before first real submission
verificationLevels.unconfirmed: Number not yet sourced; needs phone call

_meta.verificationMethod: Each entry has verifiedAt + verificationLevel. Numbers should be re-confirmed by phone every 12 months.

cigna.notes: Number sourced from Cigna's public provider docs (importantContactInformation.pdf on cigna.com). Cigna prefers electronic submission via CignaforHCP.com / Availity; fax is the documented fallback for paper claims. Confirm by phone (800-244-6224) before first real submission.

guardian.notes: Standard Guardian Dental claims fax. Managed DentalGuard plans use a different fax (+1 916-679-7197) and only accept claims that don't require x-rays. Confirm plan type from member ID card before sending.

humana.notes: Number from Humana's provider portal. Provider customer service: 800-833-2223. Confirm by phone before first real submission.

united.notes: Their provider docs surface mailing address but not a fax. Most claims go via Availity/EDI. Call 800-332-0366 to confirm fax exists and is the right one for OOC claims. Mailing fallback: PO Box 69421 Harrisburg, PA 17106 (FFS plans). DHMO uses PO Box 69422.

delta.notes: Each state subsidiary operates independently with its own fax + mailing. Delta Dental has 39 member companies. Use the patient's member ID card to identify the specific plan, then call 800-336-8478 to look up by state. TODO: split this entry into delta-ca, delta-ny, delta-tx, etc. once we have first claims and know which states are active.

anthem.notes: Anthem strongly prefers electronic submission via Availity; no public fax for OOC dental claims surfaced in 2026 docs. Practical path: call 833-894-1574 or check member ID card. May need to use Availity instead of fax for Anthem patients.

bcbs.displayName: Blue Cross Blue Shield (varies by state, FEP separate)
bcbs.notes: Each Blue plan operates independently — BCBS of Massachusetts, BCBS of Texas, Anthem BCBS of CA, etc. BCBS FEP Dental is the separate federal-employee plan (855-504-2583). Direct Blue plans publicly mail-first; fax is plan-specific. TODO: capture patient's specific Blue plan during signup and route accordingly.
